ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "student" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a student */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the customer (e.g., fair, excellent) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program status of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product purchased (e.g., computer, software) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "product_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the product purchased */,
  "purchase_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the purchase was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Features of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  "promotion_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to define the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the segment */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's membership */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_memberships_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_memberships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targeting" (
  "targeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting criteria */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "targeting_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to target customers */,
  "targeting_channel" TEXT /* Channel used to target customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targeting_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was redeemed */,
  "redemption_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the promotion was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_redemptions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_redemptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES support_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "email_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date the call was made */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mailings" (
  "mailing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mailing */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "mailing_date" TEXT /* Date the mailing was sent */,
  "mailing_type" TEXT /* Type of mailing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mailing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mailings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "social_media_date" TEXT /* Date of the social media interaction */,
  "social_media_type" TEXT /* Type of social media interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_interactions" (
  "web_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "web_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the web interaction */,
  "web_interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of web interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("web_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
